title: The senior minister of the United Front Work Department of Haigang District came to our company for investigation and inspection
contentHtml: On the afternoon of September 2, the senior minister of the United Front Work Department of Haigang District led a team to our company for investigation and inspection. Zeng Shengwen, chairman of Tianhui Plastics Group, and Jiang Sheng, chief financial officer, warmly received them. During the meeting, Financial Director Jiang Sheng gave a detailed introduction and report to the leaders on the company's ongoing projects, Tianhui E-commerce Industrial Park and Haojuntong Network Transportation Platform Project.
titleZh: 海港区统战部高部长来我公司调研视察
contentHtmlZh: 9月2日下午，海港区统战部高部长带队来我公司调研视察，天晖塑料集团董事长曾胜文、财务总监姜晟热情接待。会议期间，财务总监姜晟就公司在建项目天晖电商产业园及皓俊通网络运输平台项目向一行领导做了详细介绍汇报。
